title: Refactor watchtower_plan into pack-native feature services and namespaced commands
summary: Rebuilds the plan package around pack-native feature seams instead of mirrored core-style families.
scope_items: Add a pack integration module and capability descriptors for the plan pack.
Reorganize pack-native orchestration around feature-owned services and namespaced host commands.
done_when_items: Plan runtime behavior flows through host-discovered integration hooks.
The plan package no longer acts like a mirrored copy of generic core package families.
